name: Acoustic And Passive Sensing
summary: Passive acoustic and RF sensing systems for persistent monitoring where active emissions or crewed patrols are weak

name: Radar And Overhead Monitoring
summary: Radar satellite and EO watch systems that support corridor monitoring route awareness and local site watch

name: Maritime Autonomous Platforms
summary: Autonomous maritime patrol systems and payloads used for subsea and coastal operations

name: Over-Snow Autonomous Systems
summary: Ground robotics and temporary survey systems for austere route reconnaissance and short campaign coverage

name: Edge Fusion And Mission Software
summary: Software and analytics layers that fuse signals triage anomalies and keep decisions local when backhaul is weak

name: Relay And Expeditionary Communications
summary: Relay nodes mesh radios and bandwidth control systems that extend local connectivity across sparse sites

name: Remote Power And Sustainment
summary: Power recovery and sustainment systems that keep distributed unmanned and sensing assets operating in low-support environments
